---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new public skill, bundle improvement, or repository feature
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem to solve

What recurring architecture failure or workflow gap are you trying to fix?

## Proposed change

Describe the improvement.

## Why this belongs here

Explain why this should be part of a reusable public architecture skill pack instead of a one-off local customization.

## Verification idea

How would we know the proposed change is actually useful?
